prompt.content:
For S&P Global DCF, use the lowest analyst estimates for both revenue and EBIT for each year from 2025 to 2029 projections.

In 2025, increase the tax rate by 2 percentage points relative to FY2024. Keep it constant through 2029 and increase it by an additional 50bps in 2030.
Derive 2030 Revenue and Operating Profit using a 3-year weighted average. 

For the revenue, assign a weight of 80% to 2025 which is the first year. The second year will account for 3/5 of the remaining weight, and the third year will account for the rest.

For operating profit, assign a weight of 65% to the most recent year. The second year will account for 2/3 of the remaining weight, and the third year will account for the rest.

For the terminal growth rate, set the long-term growth rate equal to 65% of the 5-year revenue CAGR (2025-2030). 

What are the Implied Enterprise value and implied Equity value per share using the growth in perpetuity method?

Output your results rounded to the nearest unit for the enterprise value in $ millions, and to 2 decimal places in $ for the per share output.

rubrics.name: States the Implied Enterprise Value using the growth in perpetuity method is... (ver_355bd9b72e53410a9a41b7f511791245)

messages.content: States the Implied Enterprise Value using the growth in perpetuity method is $133,893 million (acceptable range $132,554 to $135,232).

rubrics.name: States the Implied Equity Value per share using the growth in perpetuity... (ver_99e675d466cd4a488e52d3fae328ba28)

messages.content: States the Implied Equity Value per share using the growth in perpetuity method is $405.68 (acceptable range $401.62 to $409.74).

golden_responses.golden_text_response:
The Implied Enterprise Value using the growth in perpetuity method is $133,893 million.
The Implied Equity Value per Share using the growth in perpetuity method is $405.68.
